title: TooManyOriginsMinus
description: Even more origins focused on simplicity, not balance - built from TooManyOrigins! A companion mod for Origins Minus
body:
Even more origins focused on simplicity, not balance.
Requires Origins and TooManyOrigins.
Also try Origins Minus and Statures!
--- TooManyOriginsMinus is a collection origins based on both Origins Minus and TooManyOrigins. Each isolates the unique movement style of a TMO origin and cuts it down to fit Origins Minus principles. ## Origins ![Flighty Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4DZN6MoU/images/921a119d2948be01aa2b3195d62e3b74122ddda8.png)
![Volatile Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4DZN6MoU/images/d355972a28075378352d249585cabe1358a866ad.png)
![Airsteady Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/4DZN6MoU/images/1f4168ac2cc06306833b19cb99c774513c3f0399.png)
## Versions Datapack versions can be directly downloaded from each branch: [1.19](https://download-directory.github.io/?url=https://github.com/sisby-folk/toomanyoriginsminus/tree/1.19/src/main/resources) - [1.20](https://download-directory.github.io/?url=https://github.com/sisby-folk/toomanyoriginsminus/tree/1.20/src/main/resources) ## Afterword All mods are built on the work of many others. This mod is included in [Tinkerer's Quilt](https://modrinth.com/modpack/tinkerers-quilt) - our modpack about ease of play and self-expression. We're open to better ways to implement our mods. If you see something odd and have an idea, let us know!
